title: IF THEN ELSEIF always evaluates the first test as true
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, flag BOOLEAN, description TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table (flag, description) VALUES (true, 'First entry'), (false, 'Second entry'), (NULL, 'Third entry');
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION evaluate_flag(b BOOLEAN) RETURNS TEXT AS $$ BEGIN IF b THEN RETURN 'true';
key_bug_features: IF THEN ELSEIF evaluates first condition as true always
